strengths: Extensive 15+ years of software engineering experience with deep expertise in the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React).
Direct experience with required niche skills, including AI agent development (MCP frameworks) and cloud/container orchestration (AWS, Kubernetes, Docker).
Strong advocate for software craftsmanship, demonstrating heavy involvement in TDD, CI/CD, and creating open-source testing frameworks.
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest, which are key components of the primary stack.
Java experience appears dated (last used professionally around 2018), and Kotlin or Python are missing from the resume.
Running a concurrent founder role (GISCollective) alongside full-time positions may prompt questions regarding bandwidth and focus.
response.justification: Bogdan is an exceptionally strong candidate who far exceeds the 6-year experience requirement. His deep background in TypeScript, Node.js, and React aligns perfectly with the core stack, and his recent work with AI agents and AWS/Kubernetes checks off major specialized requirements. While he lacks explicit experience with Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin, his proven track record of software craftsmanship, TDD, and quickly adapting to new technologies makes him a highly suitable fit for this Senior Fullstack role.
